allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3306 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,State,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3306 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path -Unique | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(netsh interface ipv4 show excludedportrange protocol=tcp)
